user.title: OpenAI Codex Usage
user.description: Enter a bearer token accepted by the Codex backend. Business and Enterprise users can create Codex access tokens from ChatGPT admin settings. Personal ChatGPT OAuth for third-party integrations is not publicly documented by OpenAI.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OpenAI Codex Usage
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new Codex access token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Codex usage endpoint.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the token and account ID.

abort.already_configured: This Codex account is already configured.

init.title: OpenAI Codex Usage Options
init.description: Configure the polling interval. The integration also respects Retry-After when OpenAI returns a rate-limit response.
